verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence first; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord. Move codes to expired only when expiry evidence is strong.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, max level 20000, and directly lists NEW CODES: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW. It does not expose rewards, per-code level requirements, or expiry proof for older codes.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public invite page was reachable and identifies the official server, but did not expose channel messages or current code-list posts, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board name is Sailor Piece. The public JSON contained stale/older code content and did not expose the July 2026 current active list, so it was not used as decisive current code proof.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: July 2026 page. Active list has five codes: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, with exact rewards. It lists 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2 and many older retained codes expired, creating stronger but non-official expiry conflict context.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated Jul 1, 2026. Active/current list includes KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, and 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM with reward details. It now lists FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2/base, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS expired.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated July 1, 2026 with a June 15 latest-codes note. Active list has 10 codes: RAIDUPDATENOW, KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It marks 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG inactive.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated July 2, 2026 and explicitly says no new codes were found. Active list has 10 codes with level gates: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED level 12,500, RAIDUPDATENOW level 9,000, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2 level 12,500, MASTERY/GHOULUPDATE/RAIDS level 7,500, and SMALLDELAYCODESORRY/FREECODEFORYALL/BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON level 12,500. It lists the June 9 codes, 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: July 2026 page. Active list contains KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG base/2/3, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, and FREECODEFORYALLL2 expired.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated Jul 1, 2026. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, the June 9 codes, 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2/base, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and FREECODEFORYALL as latest codes. Its new-code reward text still conflicts with majority reward sources. It lists SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS expired.

sources.name: U7BUY Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: June 15, 2026 page says the newest Sailor Piece codes were compiled from official Discord announcements and manually verified. It lists all 16 retained active codes plus several old/new-server-only codes that remain expired in our data because they conflict with stronger established expired context and no direct official message was accessible.

sources.name: Radio Times Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Published June 15, 2026. Current markup still exposes a June 2026 active list including KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, the June 9 codes, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, and HUGEUPDATEWWW. It is supplementary only because it is not updated for July and has historical internal conflicts.

sources.name: Sailor Piece Wiki Codes
sources.notes: Direct fetch returned HTTP 403 with a JavaScript/cookie challenge, so this page was not used as direct evidence. Search-result snippets suggested community code context, but because the page was inaccessible in this run and not official, it was not used for Level Eligibility Filter changes.

decisions.reason: Official Roblox game page still directly lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW under NEW CODES. GamesRadar July 2 explicitly says no new Sailor Piece codes were found. No additional official new code string was found.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and GamesRadar July 2 lists its level requirement as 12,500. Rewards remain supported by Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, Destructoid, and Radio Times; PCGamesN reward conflict was not enough to change the stored bundle.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and GamesRadar July 2 explicitly lists its level requirement as 9,000. Rewards remain supported by Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, Destructoid, and Radio Times; PCGamesN reward conflict was not enough to change the stored bundle.

Beebom, Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, Radio Times, and U7BUY still list these active/current, while Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired. No official expiry proof was accessible.

Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, U7BUY, and Radio Times still list this active/current, while Beebom, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list it expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

PCGamesN and U7BUY still list this active/current, while Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list it expired/inactive. U7BUY claims official Discord/manual verification, but direct official message proof was not accessible. Kept active instead of moving on conflicting non-official evidence.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, PCGamesN, Radio Times, and U7BUY list these active/current; Beebom and Pocket Tactics list them expired. Active evidence remains broader and no official expiry proof was accessible.

Destructoid, PCGamesN, and U7BUY list it active/current, while Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. Kept active because current active evidence remains and no accessible official expiry proof was found.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Radio Times, and U7BUY support much of this set as active/current, while Beebom, Pocket Tactics, or PCGamesN conflict for parts of it. No accessible official expiry proof was found.

U7BUY and Radio Times list some previously expired or old codes as active/new-server-only, but this conflicts with multiple established current pages and no direct official Discord message was accessible. Did not reactivate without stronger proof.

No active code had official expiry proof. Current third-party expiry agreement strengthened for some codes, but active evidence remains from at least one or two current sources, including U7BUY's official-Discord/manual-verification claim for the broader list.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN reward text for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW conflicts with Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, Destructoid, and Radio Times. The majority reward bundle was retained.
source_conflicts.next_step: Update rewards only if official Discord/Trello/in-game proof or stronger current-source agreement contradicts the majority bundle.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar July 2 still lists level 9,000. Fandom direct fetch returned HTTP 403, so inaccessible community snippets were not used over GamesRadar.
source_conflicts.next_step: Change the Level Eligibility Filter only if accessible official/in-game evidence or stronger current-source agreement contradicts GamesRadar.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom, Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, Radio Times, and U7BUY list these active/current; Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official evidence appears or current-source expiry agreement becomes strong enough to outweigh active evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, U7BUY, and Radio Times list it active/current; Beebom, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list it expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official expiry proof or stronger current expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN and U7BUY list it active/current; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list it expired/inactive. U7BUY claims official Discord/manual verification, but direct official messages were inaccessible.
source_conflicts.next_step: Watch closely; move only if active support drops further or official expiry proof appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, PCGamesN, Radio Times, and U7BUY list them active/current; Beebom and Pocket Tactics list them expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not move based on minority expiry conflict without official proof.

source_conflicts.conflict: Destructoid, PCGamesN, and U7BUY list it active/current; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or stronger current sources join explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Radio Times, and U7BUY support active status for much of this set; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, or PCGamesN conflict for parts of the set.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not move based on conflicting third-party pages without official or broader current expiry proof.

source_conflicts.conflict: U7BUY and Radio Times list some old codes such as 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1/2, visit/follow codes, or similar old codes as active/new-server-only, while multiple established current sources treat them as expired and direct official proof was not accessible.
source_conflicts.next_step: Reactivate only with direct official/in-game evidence or broad current agreement.
